synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-19585 Oracle Linux 9 gpsd-minimal bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19585
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19585

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19585.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
gpsd-minimal-3.25-4.0.1.el9_6.2.x86_64.rpm
gpsd-minimal-clients-3.25-4.0.1.el9_6.2.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
gpsd-minimal-3.25-4.0.1.el9_6.2.aarch64.rpm
gpsd-minimal-clients-3.25-4.0.1.el9_6.2.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/gpsd-minimal-3.25-4.0.1.el9_6.2.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1:3.25-4.0.1.el9_6.2]
- Replaced upstream reference [Orabug: 35865525]
